items.title: Fever down LA Sparks in largest win of the season
items.body_excerpt: The Indiana Fever rolled past the LA Sparks 111-87 on Saturday night at Gainbridge Fieldhouse, leading by as many as 35 points in a game where they were never really challenged. The 24-point win is their largest margin of victory this season, and the second by at least 20…
